hooks.command:
bash -c 'PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; FILE="$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/session-start-context.md"; if [ -n "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then cat "$FILE"; else printf "# Project Protocol — Session Start

Read CLAUDE.md + STATUS.md before touching any code.
Run save-session before closing.
Append to WORKLOG.md after every change.
"; fi'

bash -c 'PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then exit 0; fi; PLUGIN_VERSION=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(open("$PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-plugin/plugin.json"))["version"])" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$PLUGIN_VERSION" ]; then exit 0; fi; PROJECT_VERSION=$(cat brain/.plugin-version 2>/dev/null || echo "pre-2.5.0"); if [ -z "$PROJECT_VERSION" ]; then PROJECT_VERSION="pre-2.5.0"; fi; SKIP=$(cat brain/.plugin-version-skip 2>/dev/null); if [ "$SKIP" = "$PLUGIN_VERSION" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ "$PROJECT_VERSION" = "$PLUGIN_VERSION" ]; then exit 0; fi; MANIFESTS=$(ls "$PLUGIN_ROOT/migrations/" 2>/dev/null | sort -V | while IFS= read -r f; do V="${f%.md}"; V="${V#v}"; if python3 -c "import sys; from packaging.version import Version; sys.exit(0 if Version("$V") > Version("${PROJECT_VERSION#pre-}".replace("2.5.0","2.5.0")) and Version("$V") <= Version("$PLUGIN_VERSION") else 1)" 2>/dev/null; then printf "%s " "$f"; fi; done 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$MANIFESTS" ]; then MANIFESTS="(check migrations/ in plugin root)"; fi; printf "
████████████████████████████████████████████
⚠  Plugin drift detected.
   Project recorded version : %s
   Current plugin version   : %s
   Missing migrations       : %s

   Run /migrate-project to apply pending deltas.
   Or write %s into brain/.plugin-version-skip to defer
   (skip resets on next plugin update).
████████████████████████████████████████████
" "$PROJECT_VERSION" "$PLUGIN_VERSION" "$MANIFESTS" "$PLUGIN_VERSION" >&2'
bash -c 'printf "[project-protocol] For any non-trivial change: classify as NEW / ADDITION / UI CHANGE / BUG FIX. Append to WORKLOG.md after each action.\n"'

bash -c 'WORKLOG="brain/WORKLOG.md"; if [ -f "$WORKLOG" ] && grep -qE "^# Worklog — cleared|^> Cleared after each session\\.$" "$WORKLOG"; then printf "[project-protocol] %s is in cleared state — remember to append an entry for this change.\n" "$WORKLOG" >&2; fi'

bash -c 'WORKLOG="brain/WORKLOG.md"; if [ -f "$WORKLOG" ] && [ -s "$WORKLOG" ] && ! grep -q "^# Worklog" "$WORKLOG"; then BACKUP="brain/WORKLOG.backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"; cp "$WORKLOG" "$BACKUP"; echo "[project-protocol] PreCompact: $WORKLOG backed up. Contents preserved below for post-compaction context:"; echo "--- $WORKLOG CONTENTS ---"; cat "$WORKLOG"; echo "--- END WORKLOG ---"; else echo "[project-protocol] PreCompact: $WORKLOG empty or cleared — no backup needed"; fi'

bash -c 'PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; FILE="$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/post-compact-context.md"; if [ -n "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then cat "$FILE"; else printf "# After Compaction — Re-orient

Context was just compacted. Re-read CLAUDE.md and STATUS.md to confirm current state before continuing.
"; fi'

bash -c 'WORKLOG="brain/WORKLOG.md"; if [ -f "$WORKLOG" ] && ! grep -qE "^# Worklog — cleared|^> Cleared after each session\\.$" "$WORKLOG"; then printf "[%s] subagent_start\n" "$(date +%H:%M)" >> "$WORKLOG"; fi'

bash -c 'WORKLOG="brain/WORKLOG.md"; if [ -f "$WORKLOG" ] && ! grep -qE "^# Worklog — cleared|^> Cleared after each session\\.$" "$WORKLOG"; then printf "[%s] subagent_stop\n" "$(date +%H:%M)" >> "$WORKLOG"; fi'

bash -c 'WORKLOG="brain/WORKLOG.md"; if [ -f "$WORKLOG" ] && [ -s "$WORKLOG" ] && ! grep -qE "^# Worklog — cleared|^> Cleared after each session\\.$" "$WORKLOG"; then LINE_COUNT=$(wc -l < "$WORKLOG" | tr -d " "); echo "[project-protocol] $WORKLOG has $LINE_COUNT lines of unsaved work. Run save-session before closing."; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in */node_modules/*|*/.git/*|*/dist/*|*/build/*|*/.next/*) exit 0 ;; esac; case "$FILE" in */globals.css|*/tokens.css|*/DesignTokens.swift) exit 0 ;; esac; MATCH=0; case "$FILE" in *.tsx|*.jsx|*.vue|*.svelte|*.swift) MATCH=1 ;; esac; case "$FILE" in */global*.css|*/token*.css|*/style*) MATCH=1 ;; esac; case "$FILE" in */tailwind.config.js|*/tailwind.config.ts|*/tailwind.config.cjs|*/tailwind.config.mjs) MATCH=1 ;; esac; case "$FILE" in */styles/*) MATCH=1 ;; esac; if [ "$MATCH" != "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; VIOLATIONS=""; if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then while IFS= read -r LINE || [ -n "$LINE" ]; do LINENO=$((LINENO+1)); case "$LINE" in *"--"*) ;; *) if printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -qE "#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}"; then VIOLATIONS="$VIOLATIONS
[project-protocol design-scan] $FILE:$LINENO — raw-hex: $(printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -oE "#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}" | head -1)"; fi ;; esac; if printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -qE "[^0-9]([1-9][0-9]+|[1-9])px" && ! printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -q "0px"; then case "$FILE" in *.tsx|*.jsx|*.vue|*.svelte|*.swift) VIOLATIONS="$VIOLATIONS
[project-protocol design-scan] $FILE:$LINENO — raw-px: $(printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -oE "[0-9]+px" | head -1)" ;; esac; fi; if printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -q "font-family:"; then VIOLATIONS="$VIOLATIONS
[project-protocol design-scan] $FILE:$LINENO — raw-font-family"; fi; if printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -qE "<(select|input|button|dialog|textarea)[ >]"; then if find . -maxdepth 5 -name package.json -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l ""shadcn"" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then VIOLATIONS="$VIOLATIONS
[project-protocol design-scan] $FILE:$LINENO — native-element-when-shadcn-exists"; fi; fi; if printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -qE "<(div|span) onClick"; then VIOLATIONS="$VIOLATIONS
[project-protocol design-scan] $FILE:$LINENO — clickable-div-or-span (use Button)"; fi; if printf "%s" "$LINE" | grep -q "outline: none"; then VIOLATIONS="$VIOLATIONS
[project-protocol design-scan] $FILE:$LINENO — outline-none (add :focus-visible rule)"; fi; done < "$FILE"; fi; if [ -n "$VIOLATIONS" ]; then printf "%b
" "$VIOLATIONS" >&2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in */node_modules/*|*/.git/*|*/dist/*|*/build/*|*/.next/*) exit 0 ;; esac; MATCH=0; STRUCTURE="brain/STRUCTURE.md"; if [ -f "$STRUCTURE" ]; then if grep -q "components/ui\|components/primitives\|components/blocks\|Views/\|src/components" "$STRUCTURE"; then case "$FILE" in */components/ui/*|*/components/primitives/*|*/components/blocks/*|*/Views/*.swift|*/src/components/*) MATCH=1 ;; esac; fi; else case "$FILE" in */components/ui/*|*/components/primitives/*|*/components/blocks/*|*/Views/*.swift|*/src/components/*) MATCH=1 ;; esac; fi; if [ "$MATCH" = "1" ]; then printf "[project-protocol] design-check dispatcher: file written to %s. Run /design-check on this file before continuing.\n" "$FILE" >&2; fi'
